title: Step 2: Positioning the LineInspector Object
description:
Step 2: Positioning the LineInspector Object

Step 2: Positioning the LineInspector Object

You should now see a LineInspector object similar to the one shown below:

New LineInspector Object

Click the name label of the LineInspector object and, while holding the mouse down, drag the LineInspector object to the position where you would like the top left position of the search window to reside.

Resize the LineInspector object search window as required using the search window size handles.
